response:
To compute the **sample standard deviation** of the data set:

$$
\{25, 10, 0, 9, -1, -14, -21\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the mean (average) of the data

$$
\text{Mean} = \frac{25 + 10 + 0 + 9 + (-1) + (-14) + (-21)}{7}
$$

$$
= \frac{25 + 10 + 0 + 9 - 1 - 14 - 21}{7}
= \frac{10}{7}
\approx 1.4286
$$

---

### Step 2: Subtract the mean from each data point and square the result

$$
\begin{align*}
(25 - 1.4286)^2 &\approx 23.5714^2 \approx 555.36 \\
(10 - 1.4286)^2 &\approx 8.5714^2 \approx 73.48 \\
(0 - 1.4286)^2 &\approx (-1.4286)^2 \approx 2.04 \\
(9 - 1.4286)^2 &\approx 7.5714^2 \approx 57.33 \\
(-1 - 1.4286)^2 &\approx (-2.4286)^2 \approx 5.898 \\
(-14 - 1.4286)^2 &\approx (-15.4286)^2 \approx 238.01 \\
(-21 - 1.4286)^2 &\approx (-22.4286)^2 \approx 502.72 \\
\end{align*}
$$

---

### Step 3: Sum the squared differences

$$
\text{Sum of squares} = 555.36 + 73.48 + 2.04 + 57.33 + 5.898 + 238.01 + 502.72
\approx 1385.84
